title: _M4E's Cool Minecraft Mod (MCMCM)
description: A mod that I made on a whim. No real theme, just whatever I felt like.
body:
# Features:
### Weapons:
- 🕷️ Spider Fang
  - Has a chance to drop from cave spiders
  - Applies poison to attacked entity
- 🕷️ Spider Dagger
  - Crafted from spider fang
  - Applies either poison OR potion in offhand
    - Works with tipped arrows also
  - Has other effects with some other items
    - Sculk catalyst
    - Glass bottle
    - Milk
    - Beer
    - Wither rose
- 💎 Shriek Shocker
  - Echo shard can be loaded in, like a crossbow
  - Emits Warden-esc Shriek
  - Crafted from netherite, piston, and tinted glass
- ⚔️ Billhook
  - Acts like a hoe
  - Pulls enemies closer when attacking

### Items
- 🍺 Beer
  - Gives nausea, weakness, and regeneration to drinker
- 🥠 Fortune Cookie
  - Can be cracked open by attacking
  - Gives flavor text
  - Bad nutrition
- 💿 Flowery Field Music Disc
  - Plays a song that I composed
  - Disc shards come from interacting with the mod
- There's another music disc, but that one's on you to find out
### Other
- 🔮 Crystal Ball
  - Placeable block
  - Finds the location of any player online
  - Costs 5 levels off the user
- 💡 Torch Lamp
  - Cheap full-block light source
  - Crafted with Iron Bars
- ☁️ Cloudy Step Enchantment
  - 3 levels
  - Acts as a double jump
  - Goes on boots
- 💨 Cloudy Sprint Enchantment
  - 3 levels
  - Acts as a dash
  - Goes on chestplate
- 🏷️ Tons of other recipes I think Minecraft needs
  - Mob heads
  - Bone blocks, bones and bonemeal conversions
  - Uncraftable dyes
  - Saddle
  - Name tag
